examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.
They have a cozy little apartment.
context: I like small warmer lights. It makes your house feel more cozy. Even in the summer, I like to cuddle up with a blanket at night. I have to blow on my tea because it's so hot.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: If I'm doing that and then if a girl helping me out, will you get it? Definitely not. Why would I?

After rinsing my face, I pat it down with a towel to dry it off. Next, I use one of these dark spot pads from a bib. I love spending time out in the sun, so I definitely see some dark spots on my face.

I must take these classes if I want to become a permanent resident here in Korea. Right now we're learning about ways to describe people's personalities. I learned a really fun word. It's mudukduk. I think it's such a fun word to say and has a really hilarious meaning. The cameraman is a little bit mudukduk. It's time for bed so I'm setting my alarm. I always set three alarms. The first one is at six then I have one at six fifteen and six thirty. Just in case but I always try my best not to hit the snooze button. Let's plug this in and go to bed. I keep my phone in the living room overnight so that I'm not tempted to scroll in bed. It also forces me to get out of bed to come out here and shut off the alarm. I always wear a silk bonnet to bed to protect my hair while I sleep and the last thing I do every single night before going to sleep is read my book. I love to read.

examples: This iced tea is so refreshing.
It was refreshing to hear a different opinion.
A refreshing breeze came through the window.
context: Such a satisfying sound. Cheers! Refreshing. These days, I'm watching the Vampire Diaries, which was a really popular show in the US in the early 2000s, but I had never watched it before.

examples: This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
context: It smells very fresh and calming. I love this vibe. I really hate the bright white overhead lights.
